query_texts:
WITH nums AS (
    SELECT TOP (50000)
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS rn
    FROM sys.all_columns AS a
    CROSS JOIN sys.all_columns AS b
)
INSERT INTO dbo.heap_clustered (id, val, label)
SELECT
    CAST(rn AS INT),
    rn * 7919,
    N'row_' + CAST(rn AS NVARCHAR(20)) + N'_' + REPLICATE(N'x', 20)
FROM nums

WITH nums AS (
    SELECT TOP (50000)
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS rn
    FROM sys.all_columns AS a
    CROSS JOIN sys.all_columns AS b
)
INSERT INTO dbo.heap_plain (id, val, label)
SELECT
    CAST(rn AS INT),
    rn * 7919,
    N'row_' + CAST(rn AS NVARCHAR(20)) + N'_' + REPLICATE(N'x', 20)
FROM nums
